finding: `atm.dev.mjs` presented source-first-only guidance but still accepted lifecycle/claim mutation attempts before failing later in routing.
expectedBehavior: Source-first runner must fail closed for claim, commit, and close mutations unless an explicit source-first validation authorization is present.
evidenceOrRepro: Fixed in TASK-AAO-0168 / commit `0245f6b989d35549390b1c41d11da3cce38aad08`: `assertSourceFirstRunnerReadOnlyAction(...)` now rejects `next --claim` at the command boundary with `ATM_SOURCE_FIRST_WRITE_REFUSED` before claim mutation; `npm run typecheck`, `npm run validate:cli`, and `npm run validate:git-head-evidence` passed.
followUp: Extend the same guard to any future lifecycle mutation entrypoint added to the source-first runner, and keep the source-first regression fail-closed.
